skills.title: Front-End Development
skills.description: Build responsive UIs using React.js, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS with a focus on performance and clean user experience.

skills.title: Back-End Development
skills.description: Develop APIs and systems using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB with authentication and role-based access control.

skills.title: UI & UX Design
skills.description: Design user-friendly interfaces using Figma and modern CSS, focusing on usability, layout, and accessibility.

skills.title: Git Hub & Version Control
skills.description: Use Git and GitHub for version control, code management, collaboration, and maintaining clean project history.

portfolio.title: Final Year Project
portfolio.description: ZamHarvest is a digital platform designed to connect farmers with buyers, making it easier to trade agricultural products efficiently while supporting local farming communities.

portfolio.title: E-COMMERCE WEBSITE
portfolio.description: An e-commerce platform for browsing products, managing a shopping cart, and completing purchases with a seamless user experience.

portfolio.title: PHOTOSHOP & FIGMA DESIGNS
portfolio.description: A portfolio of design work created with Photoshop and Figma, highlighting UI/UX, branding, and visual design skills.
